lines.raw: Lesson 77 | 第77课
Terrible toothache | 严重的牙痛

lines.english: Listen to the tape then answer this question.
lines.chinese: 听录音带，然后回答这个问题。
lines.raw: Listen to the tape then answer this question. | 听录音带，然后回答这个问题。

lines.english: What time of day is it, do you think? How do you know?
lines.chinese: 你认为现在是几点？你是怎么知道的？
lines.raw: What time of day is it, do you think? How do you know? | 你认为现在是几点？你是怎么知道的？
Good morning, Mr. Croft. | 早上好，克罗夫特先生。
Good morning, nurse. | 早上好，护士。

lines.english: I want to see the dentist, please.
lines.raw: I want to see the dentist, please. | 我想看牙医。
Do you have an appointment? | 你预约了吗？
No, I don't. | 没有。
Is it urgent? | 情况紧急吗？
Yes, it is. | 是的，很紧急。
It's very urgent. | 非常紧急。
I feel awful. | 我感觉糟透了。
I have a terrible toothache. | 我牙痛得厉害。

lines.english: Can you come at 10 a.m. on Monday, April 24th?
lines.chinese: 你能在4月24日星期一上午10点来吗？
lines.raw: Can you come at 10 a.m. on Monday, April 24th? | 你能在4月24日星期一上午10点来吗？

lines.english: I must see the dentist now, nurse.
lines.chinese: 护士，我必须现在就看牙医。
lines.raw: I must see the dentist now, nurse. | 护士，我必须现在就看牙医。

lines.english: The dentist is very busy at the moment.
lines.raw: The dentist is very busy at the moment. | 牙医现在很忙。
Can you come at 2 p.m. ? | 你能在下午2点来吗？
That's very late. | 那太晚了。

lines.english: Can the dentist see me now?
lines.chinese: 牙医现在能给我看病吗？
lines.raw: Can the dentist see me now? | 牙医现在能给我看病吗？

lines.english: I'm afraid that he can't, Mr. Croft.
lines.chinese: 克罗夫特先生，恐怕他不能。
lines.raw: I'm afraid that he can't, Mr. Croft. | 克罗夫特先生，恐怕他不能。

lines.english: Can't you wait till this afternoon?
lines.chinese: 你不能等到今天下午吗？
lines.raw: Can't you wait till this afternoon? | 你不能等到今天下午吗？

lines.english: I can wait, but my toothache can't!
lines.chinese: 我能等，但我的牙痛不能等！
lines.raw: I can wait, but my toothache can't! | 我能等，但我的牙痛不能等！
